title: Add empty row and shift down the rest
author: Gricardov
body:
Hello team!
I'm reading a xlsx document as template and editing some cells based on a json array. For each iteration, I have to insert an empty row so it can leave room for the next item. I tried spliceRows but it causes the rows below to lose their styles.  Please help

comments.author: trigg-mosaic
comments.body:
I was using the streamer, but I was able to do this by just adding in an empty object or array at the point I wanted the blank line:

`worksheet.addRow({ }).commit();`

comments.author: sbadiger708
